name: Pad Thai - Midsummer Thai Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a small bowl, mix fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, tomato ketchup, and red chili flakes. Set aside.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large wok or skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add shrimp and chicken breast pieces to the pan. Stir-fry until cooked through.
6. Push the shrimp and chicken to one side of the pan, add beaten eggs, and scramble until set.
7. Mix in bean sprouts and green onions, stirring gently until vegetables are heated through.
8. Pour the sauce mixture over the noodles and ingredients in the pan.
9. Toss everything together, ensuring all components are well coated with the sauce.
10. Serve hot, garnished with toasted peanuts.
